summary: Testing complete for NEW Superadmin Panel feature. Backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed). Frontend: 100% (all screens, tabs, and interactions working correctly). All superadmin features functional: Login/logout, User management (list, subscription updates, email verification, PIN reset, delete), System statistics (users, orders, products, economic overview), System settings (API key, email, app name, grace period, contact info), Guest1 test account toggle.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ SUPERADMIN PANEL - AUTHENTICATION:
- Backend: POST /api/superadmin/login accepts email/password, returns session_token and admin info
- Cookie-based auth: Sets admin_session_token cookie (httponly, secure, samesite=none)
- GET /api/superadmin/me returns admin info when authenticated, 401 when not
- POST /api/superadmin/logout clears session and deletes cookie
- Session stored in admin_sessions collection with expiry (1 day)
- Invalid credentials properly rejected with 401
- Password hashing with bcrypt via passlib
- Frontend: AsyncStorage used to persist admin_token for mobile app
- Cookie header sent in all authenticated requests: Cookie: admin_session_token={token}
✅ SUPERADMIN PANEL - USER MANAGEMENT:
- Backend: GET /api/superadmin/users returns paginated user list (default 50 limit)
- Excludes sensitive fields: password_hash, verification_token, _id
- GET /api/superadmin/users/{user_id} returns specific user details
- PUT /api/superadmin/users/{user_id}/subscription updates subscription_active and subscription_end
- Changes persist in database (verified with GET after PUT)
- PUT /api/superadmin/users/{user_id}/verify marks email_verified=true
- POST /api/superadmin/users/{user_id}/reset-pin sets admin_pin to '1234' in settings collection
- DELETE /api/superadmin/users/{user_id} removes user and all related data (sessions, products, orders, carts, settings)
- Frontend: Users tab shows list of users with organization_name, email, phone, subscription status
- Each user card has action buttons: Abonnemang (diamond icon), Verifiera (checkmark icon), Återställ PIN (key icon), Delete (trash icon)
- Subscription modal opens with toggle button and date input (testID: toggle-sub-btn, sub-end-input, save-sub-btn)
- All user cards have testID: user-row-{user_id}
✅ SUPERADMIN PANEL - STATISTICS:
- Backend: GET /api/superadmin/stats returns system-wide statistics
- Fields: total_users, verified_users, active_subscriptions, total_orders, total_products, shared_images
- All fields return integers (counts)
- GET /api/superadmin/economic-overview uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline for performance
- Returns: users array with per-user stats (total_revenue, total_orders, paid_orders, paid_revenue, products_count)
- Totals: total_revenue, total_orders, active_users (users with orders > 0)
- Excludes cancelled and pending orders from revenue calculation
- Revenue rounded to 2 decimal places
- Frontend: Stats tab displays 6 stat boxes with icons: Users, Verified, Active subscriptions, Orders, Products, Shared images
- Economic overview card shows: Total omsättning (kr), Totala ordrar, Aktiva handlare
- Per-user breakdown with organization_name, email, revenue, orders
- All stats display correctly with proper formatting
✅ SUPERADMIN PANEL - SYSTEM SETTINGS:
- Backend: GET /api/superadmin/settings returns system_settings document
- Creates default settings if not exists (grace_period_days=7, app_name='Kassasystem')
- PUT /api/superadmin/settings updates allowed fields: resend_api_key, sender_email, app_name, grace_period_days, contact_email, contact_phone, contact_address
- Returns updated settings after save
- Changes persist in database (verified)
- Frontend: Settings tab has 6 input fields with icons: App name, Resend API key (secure), Sender email, Grace period days (number), Contact email, Contact phone
- Each field has testID: system-{field_name}-input
- Save button (testID: save-system-settings-btn) persists changes
- Swedish labels and placeholders
✅ SUPERADMIN PANEL - GUEST1 ACCOUNT:
- Backend: GET /api/superadmin/guest1-status checks if Guest1 user exists
- Returns: exists (boolean), enabled (boolean), user_id (optional)
- POST /api/superadmin/toggle-guest1 creates Guest1 if not exists OR toggles subscription_active
- Creates Guest1 with: email='Guest1', password='Guest1', email_verified=true, subscription_active=true
- Creates default settings: store_name='Testkonto', admin_pin='1234', swish_phone='1234567890'
- Creates 5 demo products: Kaffe (25kr), Latte (35kr), Kanelbulle (30kr), Smörgås (55kr), Vatten (15kr)
- Products have Unsplash images and categories (Dryck, Fika, Mat)
- Toggle switches between active/inactive subscription status
- Frontend: Guest1 card at top of Users tab shows status: 'Finns inte ännu', 'Aktivt', 'Inaktivt'
- Toggle button (testID: toggle-guest-btn) switches between 'Aktivera' and 'Inaktivera'
- Card styling changes when active (green border/background tint)
✅ SUPERADMIN PANEL - FRONTEND:
- Route: /superadmin (accessible via link on login screen)
- Login screen has 'Superadmin' link at bottom (testID: superadmin-link) with shield-checkmark icon
- Login form: Email input (testID: admin-email), Password input (testID: admin-password), Login button (testID: admin-login-btn)
- After login: Header with back button (testID: sa-back-btn), title 'Superadmin' with shield icon, logout button (testID: sa-logout-btn)
- 3 tabs: Användare (testID: sa-tab-users), Statistik (testID: sa-tab-stats), Inställningar (testID: sa-tab-settings)
- Tab switching works correctly (users is default tab)
- Logout returns to login form
- All text in Swedish
- Mobile-responsive design with proper spacing and touch targets
✅ CODE QUALITY:
- Backend routes organized in /routes/superadmin/ package: auth.py, users.py, stats.py, settings.py, images.py, common.py
- common.py has shared utilities: hash_password, verify_password, get_current_admin, require_admin
- All endpoints require admin authentication via require_admin(request) dependency
- MongoDB ObjectId excluded from all responses (_id: 0 in find_one queries)
- Async/await used properly for all database operations
- Frontend uses React hooks: useState, useEffect, useCallback
- All interactive elements have testID attributes
- StyleSheet.create() for all styles
- All text wrapped in Text component
- Error handling with try/catch and Alert.alert
- Environment variable: process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (via EXPO_PUBLIC prefix for Expo)
- Cookie sent via headers: Cookie: admin_session_token={token}
✅ SECURITY:
- Passwords hashed with bcrypt (strength: default rounds)
- Sessions expire after 1 day (SESSION_DURATION_DAYS = 1)
- Cookie flags: httponly=True, secure=True, samesite='none' (for cross-origin)
- All sensitive fields excluded from responses (password_hash, verification_token)
- Admin authentication required for all endpoints except /login
- 401 responses for unauthorized requests
✅ INTEGRATION TESTING:
- Backend tests cover full CRUD flows with database persistence verification
- Frontend tests cover full user journey: Login → Dashboard → Tab switching → User actions → Logout
- Cookie-based authentication working in both backend and frontend
- Modal interactions tested (subscription update modal)
- All testIDs verified to exist in DOM
seed_data_creation: Backend tests used existing admin@test.com account. No new seed data created (tests modified existing data and restored original state after testing).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4: NEW Superadmin Panel feature fully functional. All backend APIs passing 100%. Frontend UI tested comprehensively - login, dashboard, all 3 tabs (Users, Stats, Settings), user management actions, Guest1 toggle, logout. Previous iterations: 1-3 tested login, POS, admin panel, orders, profile, customer display, parked carts, receipts, subscriptions - all 100% passing.
